[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000111 3
1 0010101 3
2 0000111 3
3 1111001 5
4 0100111 4
5 0010000 1
6 0000111 3
7 0010001 2

01 10 0101101 4
12 21 0101000 2

34 43 0000101 2

67 76 0000010 1
70 07 0000100 1

61 16 0000001 1
72 27 0000000 a
